+        "title": "Review buildpacks configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:\n`pack build` fails with the error `ERROR: failed to build: failed to fetch builder image 'index.docker.io/paketobuildpacks/builder:base': image index.docker.io/paketobuildpacks/builder:base does not exist on the daemon: not found` on MacOS with the"
+      },

+        "title": "Apply the fix for `pack build` fails with experimental containerd feature…",
+        "description": "Cross-posting from https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/issues/1853#issuecomment-1677522514:\n\n> We want to research the reason for this bug. the idea will be:\n\n> * Confirm if there is a bug on pack or if this something related to docker.\n> * We had some ideas to use the export to OCI layout as a way\n```yaml\n##### Expected behavior\n<!--- What did you expect to happen? -->\n\n`pack build` should succeed\n\n---\n\n### Environment\n\n##### pack info\n<!--- Run `pack report` and copy output here. -->\n```"

+      }
+    ],

+      "summary": "Cross-posting from https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/issues/1853#issuecomment-1677522514:\n\n> We want to research the reason for this bug. the idea will be:\n\n> * Confirm if there is a bug on pack or if this something related to docker.",
